RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
[i]Observing[/i] the tenure of [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] (better known as "Islas") as First Minister of the region [region]The Communist Bloc[/region],
[i]Affirming[/i] that [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] is a Bloc patriot, and that Bloc patriots are IN CONTROL,
[i]Further affirming[/i] that Islas is the greatest,
[i]Explaining[/i] that greatness is something beyond a list of feats achieved but rather something that the [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] embody,
[i]Acknowledging[/i] that [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] has demonstrated a commitment to combatting the spread of fascism, up to and including the destruction of regions where such hateful ideology festers,
[i]Noticing[/i] that [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] has navigated [region]The Communist Bloc[/region] through delicate changes of alignment in the ever-shifting dynamics of interregional politics,
[i]Dreading[/i] that these changes will embolden the purveyors of the ideology of raider unity,
[i]Applauding[/i] the benevolence of [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] in the restoration of democracy to [region]The Communist Bloc[/region] in the aftermath the region's military coup,
[i]Witnessing[/i] that [region]The Communist Bloc[/region] appears on track to continue its renewed growth long after the tenure of [nation]Islands of unity[/nation] as First Minister comes to an end, despite sanctions placed on the region,
Hereby commends [nation]Islands of unity[/nation].
RESOLUTION.NAME: Commend Islands of unity
